review_title: Camera is absolutely stunning
review_body: The camera quality on the iPhone 16 is just breathtaking. Photos look professional straight out of the camera app. Portrait mode is flawless and night mode is miles ahead of the previous generation. Best smartphone camera I have ever used.

review_title: Phone gets dangerously hot during charging
review_body: This phone becomes scorching hot within 15 minutes of charging especially when used simultaneously. It is not just warm — it is burning hot to the touch. I had to stop using it while charging for safety. This is a serious defect.

review_title: A18 chip is absolutely insanely fast
review_body: There is zero lag on this device. Every app opens instantly, games run at maximum settings with no frame drops, and multitasking is butter smooth. The A18 chip is in a class of its own. Huawei and Samsung cannot compete.

review_title: Battery drains 12 percent per hour on 5G
review_body: The battery drain on 5G is completely unacceptable for a flagship device. I lose 12 percent battery per hour just browsing on 5G with screen at medium brightness. My iPhone 15 was significantly better. Apple needs to push a fix urgently.

review_title: Display is absolutely gorgeous — Super Retina XDR lives up to the name
review_body: The Super Retina XDR display is simply beautiful. Colors are perfectly calibrated, blacks are deep, and sunlight legibility is excellent. Watching HDR content on this screen is a cinema-like experience. Stunning.

review_title: Scratches appeared on frame within one week
review_body: I keep my phone in a case but small scratches appeared on the aluminum frame around the camera module within just one week. The black anodization chips off easily. For 79000 rupees I expect better material durability.

review_title: iOS 18 is the best mobile software experience
review_body: iOS 18 running on the A18 chip is absolutely fluid and intuitive. The new customisation options and AI features are genuinely useful. No bloatware no lags and battery management in airplane mode is excellent. Apple software still the gold standard.

review_title: Way overpriced compared to Android flagships
review_body: For 79999 rupees the Samsung S24 Ultra offers foldable display, S-Pen, 200MP camera, and far better battery life. Apple is charging a premium purely for the brand name and iOS ecosystem. Camera is great but not 80k great.

review_title: Night mode photography is rival DSLR quality
review_body: I shot some low light photographs at a evening event and they looked indistinguishable from DSLR photos. The computational photography on the iPhone 16 is genuinely world class. My Canon camera is feeling jealous.

review_title: My unit runs warm but not dangerously hot
review_body: My unit does get warm during charging and gaming but it has not reached the extreme temperatures others report. Probably a batch variance issue. Performance and camera are excellent though. Comfortable with the warmth so far.

review_title: Fits perfectly in hand — premium build and feel
review_body: The weight distribution is perfect and it sits beautifully in the hand. The matte black finish on the back glass is elegant and fingerprint resistant. Feels significantly more premium than any Android I have held.

review_title: Cannot sideload apps — Apple walled garden is too restrictive
review_body: I switched from Android specifically to use certain apps that Apple does not allow on the App Store. The EU has forced Apple to allow sideloading but Indian users get no such freedom. This is anticompetitive and deeply frustrating.

review_title: Lasts a full work day with moderate use
review_body: With moderate use including calls emails and social media the iPhone 16 comfortably lasts from 7am to 11pm. Turning off 5G when not needed helps significantly. Not the best battery but adequate for a working professional.

review_title: Worth every rupee for the camera and ecosystem
review_body: I am deeply embedded in the Apple ecosystem — MacBook iPad AirPods and now iPhone 16. The seamless integration between all devices is something Android simply cannot replicate. The camera alone justifies most of the cost.

review_title: Received overheating unit from batch NOV7
review_body: I received a unit from batch NOV7 and it overheats to an alarming degree within 20 minutes of normal usage. Even just watching YouTube causes severe heating. Apple customer service confirmed they are aware of the batch issue. Awaiting replacement.

review_title: Camera versatility is unmatched at any price point
review_body: From macro photography to wide landscape shots to portrait bokeh — the iPhone 16 handles every photographic scenario flawlessly. The new Camera Control button is a genuinely useful addition. Photographers will love this phone.

review_title: 5G destroys battery life making the phone unusable outdoors
review_body: Living in a 5G coverage area means my battery is consistently dead by 3pm every single day. I cannot enjoy the headline 5G feature because it eats battery at an alarming rate. This is a fundamental design flaw.

review_title: Performance is flawless for gaming and productivity
review_body: Genshin Impact and BGMI run at maximum graphics settings with absolutely no thermal throttling on my unit. The A18 chip handles everything I throw at it. Gaming performance is the best I have experienced on any smartphone.

review_title: The best iPhone ever made — period
review_body: Every single aspect of this phone is class-leading. Camera performance battery efficiency when on WiFi display quality build quality and software smoothness. The only people unhappy are those comparing it to their previous phone. This is the best.

review_title: Overheating causes display to dim and performance to throttle
review_body: When the phone heats up — which happens in about 15 minutes of intense use — the display automatically dims and performance noticeably throttles. This thermal throttling makes the advertised A18 performance meaningless during extended use.

review_title: iOS software is polished but has quirks
review_body: iOS 18 feels mature and polished but some features feel half-baked. The AI writing tools are genuinely useful. The lock screen customisation is excellent. Siri improvements are real but still not as capable as Google Assistant for complex queries.

review_title: Unboxing experience is premium — no wasted plastic
review_body: The unboxing experience is characteristically Apple — minimal, elegant, and completely plastic-free packaging. The phone feels cold and premium the moment you remove it from the box. These small details matter and Apple still does them best.

review_title: Great phone but Android offers more for less money
review_body: Objectively the iPhone 16 is an excellent smartphone. Camera is brilliant, performance is top tier, and iOS is reliable. But for the same price Android flagships offer more RAM, more storage, faster charging, and broader customisation. Value depends on ecosystem preference.

review_title: Portrait photography changed my life honestly
review_body: I run a small photography business and the iPhone 16's portrait mode has genuinely improved my client preview shoots. The subject isolation, light rendering, and skin tone accuracy are professional grade. I shoot tethered with a DSLR but iPhone 16 is my backup camera now.

review_title: Heating issue ruins the premium experience
review_body: The hardware specifications are impressive on paper but the overheating ruins the real-world experience. I paid premium price for premium performance and instead get a phone that throttles and gets uncomfortably hot. Apple needs to address this via a software patch urgently.
